title: Blade Runner 2049
short_plot_summary: A young blade runner discovers a long-buried secret that leads him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard. Set in a bleak, neon-soaked dystopian future with stunning visuals and a meditative, slow-burn pace.

title: The Princess Bride
short_plot_summary: A grandfather reads a fairy-tale adventure to his sick grandson about a farm boy who becomes a pirate, rescues his true love, and battles villains. Witty, wholesome, and endlessly quotable.

title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
short_plot_summary: Archaeologist Indiana Jones races against Nazi agents to find the legendary Ark of the Covenant, packed with treasure hunting, exotic locales, and non-stop action.

title: Spirited Away
short_plot_summary: A sulky girl wanders into a spirit world and must work in a magical bathhouse to free her parents who were turned into pigs. Imaginative, gentle, and emotionally resonant.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
short_plot_summary: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in a high-octane chase through the desert.

title: When Harry Met Sally
short_plot_summary: Two friends debate whether men and women can truly be just friends over the span of a decade, eventually falling in love.

title: The Shining
short_plot_summary: A writer slowly goes insane while serving as caretaker of an isolated hotel.

title: Interstellar
short_plot_summary: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space to ensure humanity's survival.

title: Amélie
short_plot_summary: A whimsical Parisian waitress secretly improves the lives of people around her.

title: Parasite
short_plot_summary: A poor family schemes to become employed by a wealthy family.

title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
short_plot_summary: A lonely boy befriends a stranded alien and helps him return home.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
short_plot_summary: A legendary hotel concierge and his lobby boy become involved in a stolen painting mystery.

title: John Wick
short_plot_summary: A retired assassin seeks vengeance after gangsters kill his puppy.

title: Coco
short_plot_summary: A young boy travels to the Land of the Dead to find his ancestor.

title: The Big Lebowski
short_plot_summary: A laid-back slacker gets involved in a bizarre kidnapping plot.

title: Arrival
short_plot_summary: A linguist tries to communicate with mysterious alien visitors.

title: Knives Out
short_plot_summary: A detective investigates the suspicious death of a wealthy novelist.

title: Drive
short_plot_summary: A stunt driver moonlights as a getaway driver in Los Angeles.

title: Encanto
short_plot_summary: A Colombian family with magical gifts faces the loss of their powers.

title: No Country for Old Men
short_plot_summary: A hunter finds drug money and is pursued by a ruthless assassin.

title: The Dark Knight
short_plot_summary: Batman faces the Joker, a chaotic criminal mastermind who plunges Gotham City into anarchy. Dark, intense, and morally complex.

title: The Martian
short_plot_summary: An astronaut stranded on Mars must rely on his ingenuity to survive while NASA works to bring him home.

title: Jurassic Park
short_plot_summary: Scientists clone dinosaurs for a theme park, but the creatures escape control leading to thrilling chaos.

title: The Social Network
short_plot_summary: The story of the founding of Facebook and the legal battles that followed its explosive growth.

title: Inception
short_plot_summary: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology must perform the impossible task of planting an idea.

title: La La Land
short_plot_summary: A jazz musician and aspiring actress fall in love while pursuing their dreams in Los Angeles.

title: The Avengers
short_plot_summary: Earth's mightiest heroes team up to stop Loki and an alien invasion threatening the planet.

title: Gladiator
short_plot_summary: A Roman general is betrayed and forced into slavery, rising as a gladiator to seek revenge.

title: The Lion King
short_plot_summary: A young lion prince flees his kingdom after tragedy but returns to reclaim his rightful place.

title: The Wolf of Wall Street
short_plot_summary: A stockbroker rises to immense wealth through corruption and fraud in the financial world.

title: Get Out
short_plot_summary: A young Black man uncovers disturbing secrets when he visits his girlfriend's mysterious family.

title: Toy Story
short_plot_summary: Toys secretly come to life and embark on adventures when their owner isn't around.

title: The Matrix
short_plot_summary: A hacker discovers that reality is a simulated world controlled by machines.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
short_plot_summary: Two imprisoned men bond over decades, finding solace and redemption through acts of hope.

title: Black Panther
short_plot_summary: The king of Wakanda must defend his nation and its powerful resources from enemies.
